title: Kampung Keramat
overview: Erlan Mario and Widi Kania decided to return to their grandfather's village after Maya suffered a fatal accident that left her paralyzed and frequently experiencing magical occurrences. Jabo came to pick up his three grandchildren along with Ruth to take them back to the village for Maya's healing. Jabo believed that Maya's illness was not an ordinary one, but a mystical disease that could only be cured by a shaman in a deserted village called Kampung Bekandang. Maya's healing by the shaman, however, brought about disaster and terror, threatening the lives of their family.
